title: AI Engineer
tagline: Building intelligent applications with Large Language Models, RAG pipelines, and modern machine learning — bridging research and production-ready systems.
metaDescription: Portfolio of Annamalai Kathiresan, an AI Engineer specializing in LLMs, RAG pipelines, machine learning, and intelligent applications.

pillars.title: LLM Engineering
pillars.description: Deep expertise in Large Language Models, prompt engineering, and context optimization. Building production-grade AI applications with RAG and intelligent agent workflows.

pillars.title: ML Foundations
pillars.description: Strong grounding in machine learning fundamentals, deep learning architectures, and neural network training with Python ML ecosystems.

pillars.title: AI Systems Architecture
pillars.description: Designing end-to-end AI pipelines — from embedding generation and vector search to API integration and deployment.

learning.title: Learning Journey
learning.subtitle: A curated path through the AI/ML landscape — from core fundamentals to cutting-edge generative systems.

items.title: Machine Learning Fundamentals
items.description: Supervised and unsupervised learning, feature engineering, cross-validation, and model evaluation metrics.

items.title: Deep Learning & Neural Networks
items.description: Network architectures, backpropagation, activation functions, and end-to-end training pipelines.

items.title: Natural Language Processing
items.description: Tokenization, word embeddings, transformer architectures, and text classification techniques.

items.title: Large Language Models
items.description: GPT architecture, prompt engineering, few-shot learning, context windows, and token optimization.

items.title: Generative AI
items.description: Text and image generation, diffusion model concepts, multimodal AI, and creative AI applications.

items.title: RAG & Embeddings
items.description: Vector databases, semantic search, embedding models, chunking strategies, and retrieval pipelines.

items.title: Python for ML
items.description: NumPy, Pandas, scikit-learn, data preprocessing, exploratory analysis, and ML workflow automation.

items.title: PyTorch & TensorFlow
items.description: Model building, custom training loops, tensor operations, and deployment fundamentals.

items.title: AI Agents & Tool Use
items.description: LangChain orchestration, multi-step agent workflows, tool calling, and MCP integration patterns.

items.title: RAG Knowledge Assistant
items.description: Built a retrieval-augmented generation pipeline with vector embeddings, semantic chunking, and LLM-powered Q&A over custom document collections.

items.title: Sentiment Classifier
items.description: Developed an NLP sentiment analysis model using scikit-learn and PyTorch, with text preprocessing, feature extraction, and accuracy benchmarking.

items.title: LLM Agent Workflow
items.description: Designed a multi-step AI agent with LangChain that orchestrates tool calling, memory management, and autonomous task completion.

items.title: Fine-tuning Experiment
items.description: Explored domain-specific model adaptation using transfer learning techniques, evaluating performance on custom datasets with Hugging Face transformers.
Lead architect for enterprise products. Designing scalable API-driven architectures and CI/CD pipelines — foundational skills for deploying and integrating AI services at enterprise scale.

Built data-driven dashboards with Adobe Analytics integration for Verizon, and delivered high-performance enterprise applications. Experience with large-scale data visualization directly applicable to AI/ML product development.

contact.message: I'm always open to discussing AI projects, research collaborations, or opportunities to build intelligent systems together.
